prestazioni: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade for the B4204T38 2.0L inline-4 engine using a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger with a 0.82 A/R turbine housing, paired with a custom 3.5-inch downpipe featuring a 400-cell catalytic converter from Armytrix for optimized backpressure reduction and emissions compliance

Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 2-way adjustable damping, custom spring rates (12kg/mm front, 14kg/mm rear), and Polestar-specific top mounts for track-focused alignment settings (-3.5° front camber, -2.8° rear camber) with spherical bearing reinforcement

High-flow fuel system upgrade including a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors, and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup with -10AN lines to manage crankcase pressure under sustained 6,500 RPM track sessions
estetica: Voltex Type-5R widebody conversion kit with carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, designed specifically for the S60 Polestar chassis to accommodate 285/30/19 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires on 10.5-inch wide BBS FI-R wheels
Custom carbon fiber hood with integrated NACA ducts for direct intercooler cooling, fabricated by Seibon Carbon using pre-preg autoclave curing for weight reduction (-8.2kg) and structural rigidity

Rear wing upgrade to a 9 Lives Racing WX-10 adjustable wing with 3D-printed titanium endplates, mounted on Polestar-specific aluminum pedestals with 12° angle of attack for optimal downforce (180kg at 160km/h) without compromising top speed
